channel.title: Lost In Translation
channel.description: You Believe In What You Want To, But What You See Will Always Haunt You

item.title: Pilot.md
item.description:
# Odyssey 5 ## 中译名《太空五人组》——你可能错过的神级科幻剧
### Intro 开场白 > We saw the Earth destroyed and in a heartbeat, everything and everyone we knew was gone 我们目睹地球毁灭，转瞬之间，我们所知的一切与所有人皆已消逝； > There were five of us: the crew of the space shuttle Odyssey, and we were the only survivors 我们五人——太空梭奥德赛号的全体乘员——成为唯一的幸存者； > A mysterious being who called himself The Seeker rescued us and sent us back in time 一位自称“寻觅者”的神秘存在救了我们，并将我们送回过去； > And now we have five years to live over. Five years to discover who or what destroyed the Earth. Five years to stop it from happening... again 如今我们拥有五年时光重新经历，五年时间查明毁灭地球的元凶，五年机会阻止灾难重演
### Plot 剧情 一次例行航天任务中，地球在他们眼前化为火球。
